properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2 V5 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Jesus loves me! this I know, For the Bible tells me so; Little ones to Him belong, They are weak but He is strong.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Yes, Jesus loves me, Yes, Jesus loves me, Yes, Jesus loves me, The Bible tells me so.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Jesus loves me! He who died, Heaven's gate to open wide; He will wash away my sin. Let His little child come in.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Jesus loves me! loves me still, Though I'm very weak and ill; From His shining throne on high, Comes to watch me where I lie.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Jesus loves me; He will stay Close beside me all the way; If I love Him, when I die He will take me home on high.
